mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coupon_codes (code, title, reward_type, coin_amount, coupon_type, coupon_name, discount_rate, threshold_amount, reduce_amount, coupon_expiry_days, coupon_quantity, expires_at, total_quota, redeemed_count, status, created_by) VALUES (#{code}, #{title}, #{rewardType}, #{coinAmount}, #{couponType}, #{couponName}, #{discountRate}, #{thresholdAmount}, #{reduceAmount}, #{couponExpiryDays}, #{couponQuantity}, #{expiresAt}, #{totalQuota}, #{redeemedCount}, #{status}, #{createdBy})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM coupon_codes ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE coupon_codes SET redeemed_count = redeemed_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AND (total_quota = 0 OR redeemed_count < total_quota)
UPDATE coupon_codes SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM coupon_code_redemptions WHERE code_id = #{codeId} AND user_id = #{userId}
